title: iberis procumbens
intro: Iberis procumbens, also known as Creeping Cress or Rock Cress, is a low-growing, mat-forming perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis procumbens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Iberis procumbens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat specific health conditions.
